first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core assessment of the candidate remains the same: a skilled developer who lacks specific experience in agentic AI and leadership. The differences in the detailed strengths and concerns are minor rephrasings and re-prioritizations of the same underlying information, which falls within the expected range of run-to-run noise and does not represent a substantive change in the evaluation.
